overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through Cyberpunk 2077's Night City, beginning in a narrow industrial rooftop alley, transitioning along a waterfront promenade with the KENDACHI corporate sign, passing under a massive bridge structure, navigating indoor stairwells and narrow passages, and emerging onto a bustling commercial street with neon billboards. The footage captures the game's cinematic dusk lighting with warm orange skies contrasting against cool neon city lights.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial rooftop alley flanked by concrete walls and large metal storage tanks. The camera moves forward through the passage, transitioning at around 6 seconds to a more open rooftop area with visible HVAC equipment and safety railings, while the distant city skyline remains visible ahead.

events.description: emerging from shadow into open dusk light with warm orange sky visible

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade during golden hour, with the KENDACHI corporate sign prominently displayed on the embankment wall. The camera moves along the water's edge, revealing the expansive city skyline across the water while approaching a massive bridge structure.

events.description: passing underneath the bridge structure into shadowed area
turning right to follow the waterfront path back toward building entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating under the bridge structure and turning along the waterfront path

entered.detail: steel truss framework and concrete underside of the bridge deck
thick cylindrical bridge support columns rising from the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive bridge structure, entering a shadowed semi-covered zone with concrete pillars rising from the water. The path turns along the waterfront, with the KENDACHI sign now visible to the right, before approaching a building entrance with stairs leading indoors.

events.description: entering building interior through doorway, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting
moving from dim stairwell to fluorescent-lit corridor with metal grating floors

agents.ego_description: ascending concrete stairs and navigating through narrow industrial corridors

entered.detail: utilitarian concrete stairs with metal handrails leading upward
large rectangular metal ductwork running along walls and ceiling
harsh white fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the corridor
perforated metal walkway flooring allowing visibility to levels below
close concrete walls creating a tight passage

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions indoors through a doorway into a utilitarian stairwell with concrete steps and metal railings. The camera ascends through industrial corridors featuring exposed ductwork, fluorescent lighting, and metal grating floors, completely enclosed from the outdoor environment.

events.description: emerging from narrow dark alley into open commercial street with pedestrians

agents.ego_description: moving through dark narrow alley and emerging onto bustling street level

segments.scene_description: The camera traverses a dark narrow alley illuminated by red neon lights, creating a moody atmosphere. Around 36 seconds, the scene transitions dramatically as the camera emerges from the confined passage onto a lively commercial street, revealing a food vendor, parked cars, and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with elevated walkways and digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking along urban sidewalk observing street activity and neon signage

multiple large screens displaying animated advertisements

ground floor commercial shops with illuminated entrances

segments.scene_description: The final segment unfolds on a bustling commercial street lined with digital billboards and storefronts. The camera moves along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and vehicles including a yellow taxi, while an elevated pedestrian walkway spans overhead. The environment showcases the dense urban architecture of Night City with multiple levels of infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded industrial rooftop into the dense, neon-lit heart of a bustling commercial district. It begins in a narrow rooftop alley flanked by concrete walls and metal tanks, moving past HVAC equipment toward a distant skyline before opening onto a wide waterfront promenade during the golden hour. As the camera glides along the water's edge past a prominent KENDACHI corporate sign, it passes under the heavy shadow of a massive bridge structure and turns toward a building entrance. The scene then shifts indoors, ascending through a utilitarian stairwell of concrete and metal grating before descending into a dark, red-neon alleyway. Finally, the camera emerges from the confined passage onto a lively street filled with digital billboards, food vendors, and yellow taxis beneath an elevated pedestrian walkway.
